message:
refactor(mcp): extract mission/tx lifecycle helpers to mcp_missions.rs [ft-1fv0u]

Move 16 mcp_mission_* and mcp_tx_* helper functions (450 lines) from
mcp.rs to dedicated mcp_missions.rs submodule. These handle mission
file I/O, state transitions, assignment aggregation, and Tx
commit/compensation input building. Re-export via use statement
preserves access for mcp_tools.rs and test module.

mcp.rs: 4301 -> 3867 lines (-10%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
